name: Apricot Brandy Cake
recipeInstructions:
------------------------
Brandy Buttercream Frosting:
Combine all ingredients in a mixing bowl and beat to spreading consistency.
Preheat oven to 350°F. Combine flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, oil, baby food, eggs, vanilla, cinnamon, and cloves in a mixing bowl and beat at medium speed for 2 minutes. Pour into two greased and floured 8-inch round pans. Bake 30 to 35 minutes, until toothpick inserted in center comes out clean. Let cool in pans. Remove layers from pans and sandwich together with apricot preserves. Spread top and sides of cake with frosting.
